zh.lifeSummary: 當Anastasia Pirovano於1226年出生在義大利皮蒙特諾瓦拉音沃利奧 音福利奧時，她的父親Ubertus Pirovano28歲，母親Countess Casati23歲。她於1248年與Teobaldo di Visconti在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anastasia Pirovano于1226年出生在意大利皮蒙特諾瓦拉音沃利奧 音福利奧时，她的父亲Ubertus Pirovano28岁，母亲Countess Casati23岁。她于1248年与Teobaldo di Visconti在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anastasia Pirovano was born in 1226, in Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Ubertus Pirovano, was 28 and her mother, Countess Casati, was 23. She married Teobaldo di Visconti in 1248, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1276, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anastasia Pirovano est née en 1226, à Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Ubertus Pirovano, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Countess Casati, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Teobaldo di Visconti en 1248, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1276, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anastasia Pirovano 1226 in Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ubertus Pirovano 28 und ihre Mutter Countess Casati 23. Sie hat 1248 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Teobaldo di Visconti geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1276 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia Pirovano è nata il nel 1226 nel Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Ubertus Pirovano, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Countess Casati, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Teobaldo di Visconti nel 1248, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1276, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anastasia Pirovanoが1226年にイタリアピエモントノバーアインボリオ インフエリオアで生まれた時，父Ubertus Pirovanoは28歳，母Countess Casatiは23歳であった。1248年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでTeobaldo di Viscontiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anastasia Pirovano(이)가 1226년 이탈리아 피몽 노바라 인보리오 인페리오어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ubertus Pirovano(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Casati(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1248년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Teobaldo di Visconti(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia Pirovano nasceu em 1226, em Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Ubertus Pirovano, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Countess Casati, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Teobaldo di Visconti em 1248, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1276, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anastasia Pirovano родилась в 1226 г. в местности инворио инфириор, новара, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Ubertus Pirovano было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Casati, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Teobaldo di Visconti в 1248 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1276 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anastasia Pirovano nació en 1226, en Invorio Inferiore, Novara, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Ubertus Pirovano, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Countess Casati, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Teobaldo di Visconti en 1248, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1276, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
